raw_input:
[5.0/5] Pretty gel colors These are so pretty. The glittery look is great - especially for younger women. Personally, I like the marbled colors. So, the girl and I will split this set up and she can have the colors that are more age appropriate for her and I will have the colors more age appropriate for me. [3.0/5] Nice colors very small bottles Packaging is nice love how the bottles shows what color of the polish your picking. Nice color glitter polish however they are not long lasting. I did my nails in both matte and gloss look and within two days my nails with the gloss top coat peeled off. My base and top coat bottles were relabeled so I don't know if that had something to do with it or not. The nail polish is thick because the glitter so you will need to give it a good shake or tap it a bit in your palm. [5.0/5] Beautiful vibrant dense colors All of the colors look amazing! I tested a few of them on a piece of white cardboard and can't wait to try them all! Unlike other gel polish brands this one gives you two ways of easily identifying the colors. Each bottle has a clear opening in the front of the bottle as well as a color sticker on top. Those are very useful but some colors are still hard to make out so I had to open them to get a better look.
I applied the base coat and found that it was a bit thicker than expected. I have used some other brands of gel base coats and the consistency is generally thinner. Most of the polishes are light but not to the point of being watery. It's the same consistency as non gel polishes which I prefer. However, some of the glittered polishes that have confetti included are pretty thick and almost chunky. I'm not sure that it will last long based off the consistency at first use. I hope they do last because those are some of the prettiest colors. I love that unlike other brands of gel polishes that I've used, this brand's glitter polishes are not opaque. It's both shiny and the color is dense. I put on the color A708 first cured it then topped it with A707 while leaving some of the color A708 visible. I then layered it with the color A712 on a diagonal so that some of the color A708 would still be visible. I know the colors are hard to make out from the photo. I realized after the fact that I probably should've started with the color A707 or A712 first. I used number A707 and A708 alternating on the remaining toes. I finished it by putting a gloss top coat and cured it with the UV light. I set it to 60 seconds for three rounds just to make sure the polish dried fully. It has been two days and so far so good. The photo of my toenails were taken on day two.
Overall, I love the color selections. They're very pretty hence why I chose to use 3 colors at once. I can't wait to use the rest of the colors. I really love this set. I like to paint my toes colors that are compatible with the current season so these color selections are perfect for my seasonal needs. I wish the bottle sizes were a bit larger but I guess they make up for that by offering a lot of color selections. Also, you don't need to cake on the polish. A little goes a long way. The only drawback is that the base coat seemed a bit too thick so it may not last, but it could be an isolated case with this set. It's not a deal breaker though, which is why I'm still giving it 5 stars. Plus you can always buy another base coat. [4.0/5] Love the colors Loving these colors! Easy to use, everything is labeled. My only flaw I saw was the UV/LED light needs to run a few times to really dry the nail when the color and top coat is added as its smaller than my hand so you have to move it to get all of them done [5.0/5] Excellent quality. Very attractive assortment of confetti and glitter polishes. Small bottles. This is an excellent assortment of attractive, quality gel polish, with base coat and top coat (no wipe and matte versions). The presentation elevates the worth as a gifting option. One of the best features of this set is the bottles of gel polish provide actual representations of the contents. On the top of the cap is a sticker with proper identification of the color (including glitter, confetti varieties). Also on the front label is a small circle, under the brand name, that has an accurate portrayal of the contents. Finally, a company gets it. So, this boosts the rating a bit.
There are 16 varieties of gel polish, with confetti and glitter. The consistency is perfect, allowing application of a thin coat. An ability to apply a thin coat is essential, mainly due to the size of these bottles. They are 5ml (0.17fl oz), which is one of the smallest bottles of gel polish that i've encountered. This is actually a disappointing size/quantity of gel polish. Based on the size of the bottles of gel polish, I consider this to actually be a sampler set, as opposed to a set of 'normal' sized bottles of attractive confetti, glitter gel polishes. So, i guess one can try out the various polishes and then purchase larger bottles of desired varieties.
Overall, I feel all of the polishes in the assortment are visually attractive. The polishes are excellent quality, and produce excellent results. The significant other tested the gel on some fake nails, and i commented that it looks beautiful as is...no need to add any embellishments/decorations. She agreed., but said she'd combinde solid color gel polish with these, and add some rhinestones or other decorations, maybe create a marbled effect. I could see her creative juices flowing.
The product does match the descriptions and pictures in the product details. The presentation is effective and top notch. We like the quality and consistency of the gel polishes and base/top coats. If the bottles were at least the size of the base/top coat bottles, this set would be perfect and worth 5 stars. As currently configured, based on observations and impressions, this quality 'sampler' set earns a 4.5 - 4.75 star rating, with a high level recommendation. [4.0/5] Good glitter set I have the 'confetti' set and I have to say I like almost all of the colors. The colors with the thread in them aren't my favorite due to the texture but the overall look is cool. Nice thickness on the polish. Good applicator brushes and normal dry / set times. You do get base, top and top matte coat. Really good sized set for price point. [5.0/5] So many options! I've never tried this brand before so I was curious to get to testing. Before using on my nails, I did some testers to see the outcome. The confetti ones I did on a white gel color base, one of the glittery ones I did on black. I love the grey with the subtle glitter in it. Everything applied smoothly with no lumps, except for one (not pictured in the testers, but the top left in the company's photos). That one was a bit odd but maybe for someone with more finesse and skill. This set comes with base, top and matte top coat. The glittery ones have good pigment to them, you don't need any color base to make them pop. In my photo, I only did one coat. I was pleasantly surprised by the outcome. I do my own and some friends' nails on a regular basis. They're super excited to do the green for St Patrick's day and the confetti ones for Easter. This is such a great set, with so many options, I'm very happy! [3.0/5] Takes a long time to dry So I used a salon uv light for each layer. The polish was still pretty sticky. I had it set on 120 min for each layer. After all 4 layers I had to do it 3 extra times. It still wasn't a solid dry. But I do love the glitter colors. I gave it a 3 because of the drying issues. [5.0/5] Beautiful set!! This has such nice colors and glitters! There are only about 2-3 regular colors. The rest are glitters and I did notice there were a few that looked like duplicates but will have to see how they apply once in the nail. I love the variety of the set and you don’t need to do multiple coats. I also like that the bottles have a little clear circle to preview the color! [1.0/5] Used it twice and the polish started coming off after a few days. I would not recommend. I have used cnd shellac for years and this does not even compare. [5.0/5] Beautiful and unique set I've used the white with blue and red sprinkles, which looked super cute with a red and blue triangle shaped french tip, the blue one with fibers, which was cool, and the lighter green glitter which was gorgeous. I'm going with the blue glitter next. Great set, recommend. [5.0/5] Great gel color set The colors in this set are amazing! They are easy to apply and dry perfect! [5.0/5] Some interesting Gel Polishes This jiadel gel polish set brings some gorgeous unique colors to my collection. It is very pigmented, I only swatched it once and it was full coverage. Some of the polishes in this set are very unique like the ones with fur or hair on them, I’ve never seen polishes like that before. They apply smoothly and are a nice good thick consistency. Do not let the size of the bottle fool you, these gel polishes may be packaged small but they pack a good punch. I definitely recommend this to beginners or people who like adding unique shades to their collections. [2.0/5] Super tiny bottles that gave me an allergic reation I am super disappointed in this set, the bottles are extremely small, like 1/4 the size of normal polish, so right off the bat they are hard to use because they are hard to hold onto. The colors and glitters of this are lackluster at best and you never several coats. I tend to have allergic reactions to gel polish except some brands. I dont know which chemical it is that I have a reaction to but I had a allergic reaction in just sampling these on a few nails - my cuticles puffed up and in equal parts itched and burned. These are a no-go for me. [5.0/5] Awesome unique colors This is by far the most unique set of gel polishes I've ever seen... I only wish the bottles were bigger! They're only 5 mL, but you do get a lot of options so I think the price is still fair. Depending on your preference, you'll probably want 2-3 coats of each color; they're all pictured in 2, and do cure in 60 seconds. There are colored stickers already on the top of each bottle, but I don't feel they accurately show the colors inside, so I still added swatch dots.
The black velvet box does rub off on the white top / base coat bottles, but that's okay. One of these white bottles also had some color on it making me wonder if I possibly got a set that was returned, but I honestly like the color selection far too much to take off a star even for this. [5.0/5] Variety of glittery gel nail polish! I really like how glittery these are! They'd go on quite easily. I did two coats and it look amazing. I also like the petite size bottle it comes with, perfect for training practices. They cure super easy nothing complicated. I've gotten glittery ones before and they were chunky and thick. These were very thin and not chunky at all. It's not hard to paint onto my nails. I enjoyed adding a little splash of color when painting the gel nail polish on with some extra bling to it. [1.0/5] Allergy I am severely allergic to this I developed an allergy for whatever is in it and it hurts so bad I do not recommend at all the pain I’m in is terrible [5.0/5] I love this on my first try Love these. I was confused at first that my base coat wouldn't cure well. I found out that each coat should be tacky for the next coat. The no wipe top coat is awesome. Did my first set for New Years. Gold on all, with an accent of light brown / dark brown. These are on my natural nails, which is why there is uneven lengths. My first try so I didn't take the time to shape and even the lengths.

response:
Most reviewers love colors. Pretty, vibrant, unique. Glitter confetti polishes popular. Colors well-labeled - sticker on top, color dot on front bottle. Good variety seasonal colors. Marbled layering possible.

Bottles small - 5ml, smallest many seen. Some call sampler set, not full set. Base coat thick for some. Glitter polishes need shake before use.

Drying time issue for some - one reviewer need 120 minutes per layer under UV light. Most cure fine 60 seconds few rounds.

Two reviewers have allergic reactions - itching, burning, swelling around cuticles. One reviewer polish peeled after two days. One reviewer compare unfavorably to CND Shellac.

Overall most buyers happy. Good price point. Good gift option. Recommend 2-3 coats for full color. Buy separate base coat if thick base coat bother you.
